title: Top and bottom quant-rated small-cap consumer discretionary stocks
content:
[Consumer Discretionary Apparel Stock Market Industry Sector Wall Street Buildings 3d Illustration]
iQoncept

As Q4 earnings season draws to a close, investors are shifting focus to the updated quant ratings following the latest wave of corporate results. These scores offer a snapshot of how companies rank across key factors, including valuation, growth, profitability, momentum, and revisions.

Below is an overview of large-cap consumer discretionary companies with market capitalizations between $30M and $2B, highlighting those with the highest and lowest quant ratings. The comparison underscores which stocks strengthened their fundamentals and which ones lagged.

AMONG THE HIGHEST SA QUANT-RATED COMPANIES, ALL HAVING A STRONG BUY RATINGS ARE:

 	* Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (BWMX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BWMX]), Quant Rating: 4.87 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BWMX/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Buy.
 	* Rocky Brands (RCKY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/RCKY]), Quant Rating: 4.86 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/RCKY/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Buy.
 	* LuxExperience B.V. (LUXE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LUXE]), Quant Rating: 4.79 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LUXE/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Buy.
 	* Smith & Wesson Brands (SWBI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SWBI]), Quant Rating: 4.77 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SWBI/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Buy.
 	* Movado Group (MOV [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MOV]), Quant Rating: 4.71 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MOV/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Buy.

AMONG THE LOWEST SA QUANT-RATED COMPANIES, ALL HAVING A STRONG SELL RATINGS ARE:

 	* Groupon (GRPN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GRPN]), Quant Rating: 1.08 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GRPN/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Sell.
 	* Sharplink (SBET [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SBET]), Quant Rating: 1.17 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SBET/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Sell.
 	* Sweetgreen (SG [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SG]), Quant Rating: 1.18 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SG/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Sell.
 	* ECARX Holdings (ECX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ECX]), Quant Rating: 1.25 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ECX/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Sell.
 	* Dream Finders Homes (DFH [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DFH]), Quant Rating: 1.26 [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DFH/ratings/quant-ratings], Strong Sell.
